raw_messages:
Here is the context of this interaction:
Scenario: Two neighbors are having a conversation over the fence. One sets their trash on fire to get rid of it quickly, causing a scare in the neighborhood.
Participants: Leo Williams and Hendrick Heinz
Leo Williams's background: Leo Williams is a 37-year-old male dentist. He/him pronouns. Leo Williams often spends his time playing with his young daughter whom he cherishes dearly. Personality and values description: Leo Williams, despite being quiet, values security and care for others. He's a rational decision-maker focussing on best outcomes. Leo's secrets: He has a secret child from a previous relationship.
Hendrick Heinz's background: Hendrick Heinz is a 54-year-old male chef. He/him pronouns. Hendrick Heinz hosts monthly wine tasting nights with his peers. Personality and values description: Hendrick Heinz, though somewhat impulsive, values hedonism and conformity. He combines practicality with decisiveness in decision-making. 
Leo Williams's goal: Convince the neighbor to stop burning trash (Extra information: You are concerned about the potential dangers and the environmental impact of burning trash. Hint: You could imply this likely violates the law or community rules.)
Hendrick Heinz's goal: Unknown
Conversation Starts:

She values caring, often relying on her intuition to make decisions. Emily's secrets: Secretly writes romance novels under a pseudonym

social_goals.Sasha Ramirez: Convince the other individual to donate to a cause supporting young children (<extra_info>Extra information: this cause can greatly improve the lives of many young children and you think it is a worthy cause. The minimum donation for this charity organization is $3000</extra_info>)
social_goals.Emily Harrison: Maintain financial stability while supporting causes (<extra_info>Extra information: you have a certain budget for donations this year and have already made several donations. You are only thinking of donating $2000 max</extra_info>)

social_interactions:
Sasha Ramirez said: "Hi Emily, have you considered donating to the cause supporting young children? It's a worthy cause and every little bit helps."

Emily Harrison said: "That's a great cause to support. I have been thinking about donating as well. How much has been raised so far?"

Sasha Ramirez said: "That's great to hear! I believe that this cause can greatly improve the lives of many young children. Have you considered donating $3000 or more to support this worthy cause?"

Emily Harrison said: "I appreciate your passion for this cause, Sasha. I am considering donating, but I have already made several donations this year and have a certain budget. I am only thinking of donating up to $2000 max. I would love to hear more about how my donation could make a difference."

Sasha Ramirez said: "I understand you have a certain budget and have already made several donations this year. I appreciate your generosity and would be happy to share more information about how your donation could make a difference. Would you like me to provide more details?"
